pages.raw_text:
Owing to a serious mIshap at the
city pumping station, Mayor Pratt
this afternoon issued an order that
all sprinkling mus, cease IN every
part of the city this evening and
tomorrow. This course Is abso-
Iutely necessary to preserve water
to drink and for fire projection.


At 8 this morning a set Of CRATES
fell into the fIune, followed by
some pIanking, and in order to re-
pair the damage it was found nee
essary to close the head gates,
shutting the water off from the
wheels that drive the pumps.


Consequently the power has been
badly crippled and the greatest
care will be needed the next 48
hours at least.


This accident emphasizes Com
missioner ReuterdahI's contention
for an auxiliary steam plant to be
used In case the water power plant
fails, as II has failed today.


Il failed today because there has
been no opportunity to stop the
pumps for repairs. There was
simply nothing to do but keep them
running and trust to Providence.


BY means of the reservoirs and
what pumping can be done the
commissioner hopes to avoid any
suffering, but consumers can make
this impossible II they refuse to
recognize the gravity Of the situa-
ton.
